prompt: Search the structured financial line rows on Westfield for anything mentioning concrete and show the amounts.

observations: tools fired: backendDeepAgentProjectStatus, project_lookup, packet_reader, teams_reader, meetings_reader, emails_reader, documents_reader, financials_reader, schedule_reader, rfi_reader, submittal_reader, deepagents_runtime
score.finalText:
No structured financial line rows for Westfield Collective mention “concrete” in the budget lines I checked. On the financial side, that means I could not surface any concrete-specific amount to quote from the structured budget layer.

Evidence
- Westfield Collective budget summary shows $0 original budget, $0 revised budget, $0 approved budget changes, and $0 prime contract value. Source: `project_budget_summary` for Westfield Collective.
- I queried `budget_lines` for Westfield Collective across line description, cost code title, division title, and common concrete cost-code patterns; the result was 0 rows. Source: `query_db` on `budget_lines` / `cost_codes`.
- The project’s structured financial line layer, as checked here, therefore contains no concrete-tagged amount to report. Source: `query_db` result, 0 rows.
- Current project coverage is still active on emails/documents/financials, but meetings, RFI, and submittal coverage are missing, so the broader control picture is incomplete. Source: provided source coverage.

What this means
This does not look like a concrete cost exposure showing up in the budget line structure yet. The bigger read is that Westfield’s financial control data is thin and effectively empty at the project budget layer, so you should not treat that as proof there’s no concrete work — just proof it is not surfaced cleanly in the structured budget lines I checked.

Recommended next steps
- If you want the real exposure read, I’d broaden from budget lines to commitments, PO lines, invoices, and ERP mirror tables for “concrete” on Westfield.
- If you only care about the current PM budget layer, the answer is: no concrete rows found, no amounts to report.

Uncertainty
- I only checked the structured budget line layer, not every financial table in the system.
- The project budget summary itself is $0 / blanked out, so there is no usable amount there to anchor a concrete-specific read.
- Meetings, RFI, and submittal coverage are missing, which limits cross-checking against field or coordination context.

Source coverage note: meetings: missing; rfi: missing; submittal: missing. I did not use unavailable or stale source categories as factual support.

sources.title: RE: Alleato Group: Westfield Collective: Roll Up Counter Doors
sources.snippet:
Subject: RE: Alleato Group: Westfield Collective: Roll Up Counter Doors
Date: 2026-06-08T12:18:19Z
From: James Wallace <james@midwestgaragedoors.com>
To: Andrew Cannon <acannon@alleatogroup.com>

Andrew The rolling door manufacturers have a way of dragging things out so I would not count on them getting back with me today. I will let you know as soon as I hear something.       James Wallace Midwest Garage Doors 437 east stop 18 road Greenwood, Indiana 46143 1-317-889-9500   F

sources.title: Re: Alleato Group: Westfield Collective: Roll Up Counter Doors

To: James Wallace <james@midwestgaragedoors.com>

James,  Understood, I will keep my eye out for a call or email. It would be great to have an update back today or tomorrow if possible.  Thank you, Andrew Cannon    Assistant Project Manager at Alleato Group Mobile  317.315.3968 |   Email   acannon@alleatogroup.com Web
